title: Teltonika TRB143 M-BUS Gateway
description: The TRB143 industrial gateway was designed with an integrated M-Bus interface specifically for telemetry and utility-monitoring applications. It features cellular and wired connectivity, one Gigabit Ethernet port, and a pair of digital Inputs/Outputs, making it applicable to a variety of environment-monitoring scenarios M-BUS INTERFACE: Supporting up to 250 client devices CONNECTIVITY: 4G/LTE (Cat 4), 3G, 2G DURABILITY: Rugged aluminum housing COMPACT: Simple integration Device 18 W PSU Mobile antenna (magnetic mount, SMA male, 3 m cable) Hex key LAN cable QSG (Quick Start Guide)
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency LTE, 2G (GSM), 3G (GSM), 4G (GSM) Type of antenna Detachable Detachable antennas 1 Integrated 4G/LTE radio part Yes Connectors and Interfaces RF connectors (1) SMA female LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps SIM slot Yes SIM slots quantity 1 Power Power over Ethernet 12 .. 30V DC Power type 4-pin automotive PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 6 Power via connector/terminal 12 .. 30V DC Physical characteristics Protection class IP30 Design Desktop Purpose Indoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 75 Weight [g] 145 Width [mm] 75 Height [mm] 25 Depth [mm] 73 Hardware CPU ARM Cortex A7 CPU frequency [MHz] 1300 Internal storage [MB] 512 RAM [MB] 256
